name: dongsheng123132--social-copy-generator
description: Generate platform-optimized social media copy for product launches. One input, 14 platform outputs (Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Hacker News, Reddit, Xiaohongshu, Jike, WeChat Moments, Weibo, Zhihu, Bilibili, Douyin, Video Account, Telegram, and more). Auto-generates an HTML page with one-click copy buttons. Supports Chinese and English bilingual content.
